problem_text_cn: 1417 计算：(1) 氢原子第$n$个轨道的周长与在该轨道上运动的电子的德布罗意波长之比值；(2) 氢原子在$n=1$轨道上运动的电子的德布罗意波长。
problem_text_en: 1417 Calculate: (1) The ratio of the circumference of the $n$-th orbit of a hydrogen atom to the de Broglie wavelength of the electron moving in that orbit; (2) The de Broglie wavelength of the electron in the $n=1$ orbit of a hydrogen atom.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 由玻尔角动量量子化$mvr_n = n\hbar$，结合$S_n = 2\pi r_n$和$\lambda_n = h/(mv_n)$，可得$S_n/\lambda_n = n$；(2) $n=1$时，$\lambda_1 = 2\pi a_0$，代入玻尔半径$a_0 = 0.0529\ \mathrm{nm}$，得$\lambda_1 = 0.332\ \mathrm{nm}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) From Bohr's angular momentum quantization $mvr_n = n\hbar$, combined with $S_n = 2\pi r_n$ and $\lambda_n = h/(mv_n)$, we get $S_n/\lambda_n = n$; (2) For $n=1$, $\lambda_1 = 2\pi a_0$. Substituting the Bohr radius $a_0 = 0.0529\ \mathrm{nm}$, we find $\lambda_1 = 0.332\ \mathrm{nm}$.
problem_answer: (1) 比值为$\boldsymbol{n}$；(2) 德布罗意波长为$\boldsymbol{0.332\ \mathrm{nm}}$。
